   |
5 | app.mapHead("/", () => Results.text("Hello"));
   | ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
hint: Supported compiler methods are mapGet, mapPost, mapPut, mapPatch, mapDelete, sse, and ws.
